announcements.title: Final Exam Registration Deadline Approaching
announcements.excerpt: Registration for the final semester exams closes on July 20, 2026. All students must complete registration by this date.
announcements.fullContent:
This is a reminder that the registration deadline for the final semester examinations is fast approaching. All students are required to complete their registration by July 20, 2026.

Important Details:

  • Registration closes at 11:59 PM on July 20, 2026
  • Late registration will incur a penalty fee
  • Ensure you have paid all outstanding fees
  • Contact the admin for any registration issues

Don't wait until the last minute. Complete your registration today!
announcements.author: Admin

announcements.title: Weekly Study Group: Mathematics Session
announcements.excerpt: Join our weekly Mathematics study group every Saturday at 3 PM. All students are welcome!
announcements.fullContent:
The Mathematics study group is now meeting every Saturday at 3 PM. This is a great opportunity to work through challenging problems with peers and tutors.

Session Details:

  • Day: Every Saturday
  • Time: 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM
  • Platform: WhatsApp group + Video call
  • Topics: Calculus, Algebra, Statistics

Bring your questions and be ready to learn!
announcements.author: Math Tutor

announcements.title: New Study Materials Uploaded for CN/CM
announcements.excerpt: Fresh lecture notes and practice questions for Computer Networking and Communication have been uploaded to the resource library.
announcements.fullContent:
We're excited to announce that new study materials for Computer Networking and Communication (CN/CM) are now available.

What's New:

  • Lecture notes for Weeks 8-12
  • Practice questions with solutions
  • Past exam papers (2018-2025)
  • Summary guides for quick revision

Access these materials through the Resources page or directly from your class WhatsApp group.
announcements.author: Resource Team

announcements.title: Important: Semester Break Schedule
announcements.excerpt: The semester break will run from August 1-15, 2026. Plan your studies accordingly.
announcements.fullContent:
This is to inform all students that the semester break will run from August 1 to August 15, 2026.

Key Dates:

  • Break Start: August 1, 2026
  • Break End: August 15, 2026
  • Classes Resume: August 16, 2026
  • Exams Start: August 20, 2026

Use this time to revise and prepare for your upcoming exams. Study groups will continue to operate during the break.
announcements.author: Admin

announcements.title: Welcome New Students! Orientation Week Details
announcements.excerpt: Orientation week for new students starts July 25. Join our welcome sessions and meet your peers.
announcements.fullContent:
We are thrilled to welcome all new students to the Cyber School Experience community! Orientation week runs from July 25-31, 2026.

Orientation Schedule:

  • Day 1: Welcome session & community introduction
  • Day 2: Platform walkthrough & group assignments
  • Day 3: Meet your tutors & academic advisors
  • Day 4: Study skills workshop
  • Day 5: Peer networking & social session

Check your class WhatsApp group for daily session links and updates.
announcements.author: Community Team

announcements.title: System Maintenance: Platform Downtime
announcements.excerpt: The Cyber School Experience platform will be down for maintenance on July 28 from 2 AM to 6 AM.
announcements.fullContent:
We will be performing scheduled maintenance on our platform on July 28, 2026 from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM (GMT).

What to Expect:

  • Platform will be inaccessible during this period
  • All resources will remain intact
  • WhatsApp groups will remain active
  • No action required from students

We apologize for any inconvenience. Thank you for your understanding.
announcements.author: IT Team

announcements.title: Final Exam Timetable Released
announcements.excerpt: The official timetable for the final semester exams is now available. Check your schedule and prepare!
announcements.fullContent:
The final examination timetable for the semester is now available for download. Check your schedule carefully and note all your exam dates.

Important Notes:

  • Exams run from August 20 - September 5, 2026
  • Each exam is 2 hours long
  • Morning sessions: 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM
  • Afternoon sessions: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM
  • Evening sessions: 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Click the link below to download the full timetable.
announcements.author: Admin

announcements.title: Tutor Recruitment Drive 2026
announcements.excerpt: We are recruiting new tutors for the upcoming semester. Apply now and join our teaching team!
announcements.fullContent:
Cyber School Experience is looking for passionate and knowledgeable tutors to join our team for the upcoming semester.

Requirements:

  • Strong academic record in your field
  • Excellent communication skills
  • Ability to explain complex concepts clearly
  • Commitment of 3-5 hours per week

Benefits:

  • Leadership and teaching experience
  • Certificate of recognition
  • Letter of recommendation
  • Network with faculty and professionals

Interested? Contact the admin for the application form.
announcements.author: Admin
